attention_mechanisms.name: attention_basic_heatmap
attention_mechanisms.title: Basic Attention Heatmap
attention_mechanisms.description: Shows how each token attends to every other token using scaled dot-product attention.

attention_mechanisms.name: attention_all_heads
attention_mechanisms.title: Multi-Head Attention Patterns
attention_mechanisms.description: Each attention head learns to focus on different aspects of the input.

attention_mechanisms.name: causal_mask
attention_mechanisms.title: Causal Attention Mask
attention_mechanisms.description: Lower triangular mask ensures each token can only attend to past and current positions.

attention_mechanisms.name: attention_patterns
attention_mechanisms.title: Common Attention Patterns
attention_mechanisms.description: Four archetypal attention patterns: uniform, local, self-focused, and content-focused.

loss_functions_and_math.name: cross_entropy_curve
loss_functions_and_math.title: Cross-Entropy Loss Curve
loss_functions_and_math.description: Shows how cross-entropy loss increases sharply as predicted probability of the correct class drops.

loss_functions_and_math.name: activation_functions
loss_functions_and_math.title: Activation Functions Comparison
loss_functions_and_math.description: ReLU, Sigmoid, Tanh, GELU, and Swish — the most common activation functions in deep learning.

loss_functions_and_math.name: kl_divergence
loss_functions_and_math.title: KL Divergence
loss_functions_and_math.description: KL divergence measures how one probability distribution differs from a reference distribution.

loss_functions_and_math.name: loss_landscape
loss_functions_and_math.title: Loss Landscape
loss_functions_and_math.description: A contour plot of the Rosenbrock function with a gradient descent path, illustrating optimization challenges.

gradients_and_optimization.name: embedding_gradient_sparsity
gradients_and_optimization.title: Embedding Gradient Sparsity
gradients_and_optimization.description: Only tokens present in the batch receive gradient updates — most embedding rows stay at zero.

gradients_and_optimization.name: gradient_flow_layers
gradients_and_optimization.title: Gradient Flow Through Layers
gradients_and_optimization.description: Gradient norms typically decrease in deeper layers, showing the vanishing gradient problem.

gradients_and_optimization.name: learning_rate_comparison
gradients_and_optimization.title: Learning Rate Comparison
gradients_and_optimization.description: Too high: loss oscillates. Too low: convergence is slow. A good LR balances speed and stability.

gradients_and_optimization.name: hyperparameter_sensitivity
gradients_and_optimization.title: Hyperparameter Sensitivity
gradients_and_optimization.description: Shows how final validation loss changes with learning rate, batch size, weight decay, and dropout.

embeddings.name: embedding_space_pca
embeddings.title: Embedding Space PCA
embeddings.description: Semantically similar words cluster together in embedding space, visible via PCA projection.

embeddings.name: cosine_similarity_matrix
embeddings.title: Cosine Similarity Matrix
embeddings.description: Cosine similarity reveals semantic relationships between word embeddings.

training_objectives.name: mlm_vs_autoregressive
training_objectives.title: MLM vs Autoregressive
training_objectives.description: BERT masks random tokens and predicts them; GPT predicts each token from left-to-right context.

fine_tuning_methods.name: lora_matrices
fine_tuning_methods.title: LoRA Matrix Decomposition
fine_tuning_methods.description: LoRA freezes the original weight matrix W and trains low-rank matrices A and B.

fine_tuning_methods.name: lora_parameter_comparison
fine_tuning_methods.title: LoRA Parameter Comparison
fine_tuning_methods.description: LoRA trains only ~0.3% of parameters compared to full fine-tuning, scaling efficiently.

regularization.name: dropout_behavior
regularization.title: Dropout Behavior
regularization.description: Dropout randomly zeros out neurons during training. Higher rates = more neurons dropped.

regularization.name: dropout_training_comparison
regularization.title: Dropout Training Comparison
regularization.description: Without dropout (p=0) the model overfits; moderate dropout (p=0.2) gives best validation loss.

dimensionality_reduction.name: pca_explained_variance
dimensionality_reduction.title: PCA Explained Variance
dimensionality_reduction.description: Scree plot and cumulative variance show how many principal components capture most of the data variance.

dimensionality_reduction.name: pca_projection
dimensionality_reduction.title: PCA Projection
dimensionality_reduction.description: Left: original data with principal component directions. Right: data projected onto PC axes.

transformer_deep_dive.name: positional_encoding
transformer_deep_dive.title: Positional Encoding
transformer_deep_dive.description: Sinusoidal positional encodings give each position a unique pattern using sin/cos at different frequencies.

transformer_deep_dive.name: transformer_shapes
transformer_deep_dive.title: Transformer Tensor Shapes
transformer_deep_dive.description: Shows how tensor dimensions change as data flows through a transformer layer.
